meta.note: BoB's own agent-memory L1 store — the single BoB-OWNED (writer) collection. Reads are universal; writes are single-owner (single-writer fence). collection = provider _collection_name(2560) from collection_prefix 'bobclaw_'. Dim follows the embed_text slot (qwen3-embedding-4b default since v0.98).

EXAMPLE bring-your-own corpus instance. Point 'repo' at any local git repo of notes/docs you want BoB to read. Read-only from BoB's perspective (writer is your own indexer). Copy this block once per corpus you federate.
